{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Underlord Arelius
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Underlord Arelius]] took [[Lindon]] and his companion under his wing.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Underlord Arelius was kind enough to take myself and my companion under his wing.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
